notes: Great blue heron on the beach at low tide, standing, facing right. Per the design doc's Act 4 spec: single-color silhouette, tiny (~4x10). Just enough to read as HERON from twelve feet away on the Rev-4 stick's screen. Palette · 0 transparent · 1 slate silhouette. No details.
